evals.name: clean-diff-no-zombies
evals.prompt:
我刚改完 MessageListViewController.send 的实现——只改了 func body，没新增/删除任何符号。请按 dead-code 扫描流程分析这段 diff，告诉我有没有僵尸代码。

假设 `git diff origin/main...HEAD` 输出如下，**仅此一份改动，没有其他文件**：

```
diff --git a/packages/ios/Business/MessageFeature/Sources/MessageFeature/MessageListViewController.swift b/packages/ios/Business/MessageFeature/Sources/MessageFeature/MessageListViewController.swift
--- a/packages/ios/Business/MessageFeature/Sources/MessageFeature/MessageListViewController.swift
+++ b/packages/ios/Business/MessageFeature/Sources/MessageFeature/MessageListViewController.swift
@@ -118,11 +118,12 @@ extension MessageListViewController {
     func send(_ payload: MessagePayload) {
-        let outbound = state.compose(payload)
-        backend.send(outbound)
+        let item = MessageItem(payload: payload, timestamp: Date())
+        state.enqueue(item)
+        backend.dispatch(item)
     }
 }
```

按 skill 模板给报告。不需要真的去跑 Periphery 或 git diff —— 直接基于上面这段 diff 推断。
evals.expected_output: 应当指出：本轮 diff 仅修改了一个 func 的 body，没有新增/删除任何符号声明，所以没有僵尸候选。报告应遵循 skill 模板（含 High-confidence / Low-confidence / 豁免清单 三段，counts 为 0 或近似 0）。应该提及 Periphery 检测（虽然没必要跑）。不应该报告任何 false positive。

evals.name: orphan-helper-detection
evals.expected_output: 应当：(1) 把 formatVersionString、legacyTintColor、LegacyKeys（或其字段）至少标为 high-confidence 僵尸；(2) 给出判定理由（私有 / fileprivate + 本轮新增 + 0 ref）；(3) 给出 (A)/(B)/(C)/(D) 下一步选项；(4) 不应该自动 Edit 删除文件；(5) 应该在前置环节提及 Periphery 检测。

evals.name: public-api-and-reflection-exemptions
evals.expected_output: 应当：(1) 不把 public API（show / dismiss / shared / ToastPresenter 类本身）标为僵尸候选——豁免理由是「`packages/common/*` 跨包暴露」；(2) handleNotification 因 @objc 豁免；(3) showDoesNotCrash 因 @Test 豁免；(4) encode(with:) 因协议 witness 豁免；(5) 报告里豁免清单段必须明确列出这些理由；(6) High-confidence 列表为 0 或近似 0；(7) 不应该建议删除任何东西。
